uplink.description: 5-in-1 odour sensor: battery, temp, humidity, CO2, NH3, H2S (TTN example inputs)
Negative temperature with distinct CO2/NH3/H2S (synthetic, in-bounds; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds bytes; expected values produced by running the upstream reference decoder (oracle) and then normalized (battery percent -> batteryPercent; temperature/humidity/co2 -> air.*; nh3/h2s kept as ppm extras).
Synthetic. Upstream returns a bare {} (empty data) here; this codec reports an error instead, per AUTHORING.md (never return a bare {}).
